heading: Can I bring an existing MongoDB deployment into MongoDB Atlas for management?
body:
No. However, you can upload data from existing MongoDB deployment into
MongoDB Atlas.

You can use live migration in the Atlas UI to live migrate data from
a source replica set or sharded cluster to an Atlas cluster.
To choose an import strategy, see [Migrate or Import Data](import-strategies).

You can also write scripts using official MongoDB supported drivers to
upload data.
